resources.string: Apache License 2.0\n\nComprehensive suite of libraries that provide modern Android development patterns and Material Design components.
Apache License 2.0\n\nKotlin programming language and its standard library, including coroutines for asynchronous operations.
Apache License 2.0\n\nGoogle MediaPipe framework providing ready-to-use ML solutions for computer vision, audio, and text tasks.
Model Hub and Inference API\n\nGemma and other models available on Hugging Face. Each model has its own license terms - please verify before use.
Gemma Community License\n\nGoogle Gemma model family. Licensed under Gemma Terms of Use. Refer to https://ai.google.dev/gemma/terms for complete license terms.
Apache License 2.0\n\nCloud sandbox for executing untrusted code safely.
